title: Malaysian Mozzarella Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make appetizer inspired by Malaysian street food, featuring crispy fried mozzarella cheese on skewers.
instructions: Cut the mozzarella cheese into 1-inch cubes.
Thread 3-4 mozzarella cubes onto each bamboo skewer.
Dredge the cheese cubes in a mixture of cornstarch and a pinch of salt.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Fry the skewers in batches for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Drain the skewers on paper towels.
Serve immediately with Malaysian chili sauce (if using).
